.file-embed.background: rgb(35, 36, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(35, 36, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(16, 17, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(16, 17, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(16, 17, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(24, 25, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(164, 100, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(16, 17, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgb(164, 100, 252) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(35, 36, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(35, 36, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgb(35, 36, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(16, 17, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(35, 36, 51) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(16, 17, 25) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(175, 178, 199) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(255, 200, 61) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: color(srgb 0 0.866667 1 / 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: color(srgb 0 0.866667 1 / 0.06) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
